title: Sodexo India Global Group is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sodexo India Global Group is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Sodexo India Global Group in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sodexo India Global Group:
Sodexo India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sodexo India Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
